Who We Are

Not a Job.
A Standard.

Dynasty X KIN is a sales and leadership organization built on one belief: the best version of you is unlocked through relentless standards, ruthless accountability, and a culture that refuses to be average.

We operate under KIN — an organization that develops people from the inside out. Dynasty is our sales arm, our competitive engine, and the standard-bearer for what elite performance looks like in the field.

1st
Target Ranking
0
Excuses Accepted
∞
Ceiling for Growth
What We're Building

The Empire
In Progress

Three pillars. One mission. Building the infrastructure for leaders to win at work and in life.

01
Sales Excellence
A door-to-door and field sales operation that sets the standard for execution, attitude, and results. We don't just hit numbers — we build the habits that make numbers inevitable.
Dynasty Home
02
Leadership Development
Through DBD — Developed By Dynasty — we invest in people before they're ready. We develop mental, spiritual, social, and professional pillars in every person who commits to the program.
DBD Program
03
Legacy & Acquisition
We are building toward business ownership, acquisition, and generational wealth. This isn't a job. It's a vehicle — and we are driving it all the way.
Long Game
How We Hire. What We Promote.

One of One

There are four things we look for in every person who walks through our door. These aren't just hiring criteria — they are the DNA of Dynasty. You either have them, or you develop them. There's no in-between.

G
G
Grit
Push through when it's hard, boring, and uncomfortable. No shortcut. No quit. Just get it done.
I
I
Integrity
Do what you say. Say what you mean. How you act when no one's watching is who you actually are.
P
P
Positive Influence
Your energy is contagious — make sure it's worth catching. We elevate rooms, we don't drain them.
C
C
Coachable
Ego is the enemy of growth. Stay a student. Hear hard feedback and get better because of it.
ONE OF ONE — DYNASTY X KIN
The Dynasty Mantra

Do The
Thing.

Three words. That's it. No elaborate strategy, no perfect conditions, no waiting until you feel ready. The thing in front of you — the hard call, the early morning, the uncomfortable conversation, the door you don't want to knock — do it.

We built an entire presentation around this. Because the people who win aren't the most talented — they're the ones who consistently do the thing everyone else keeps putting off. That's Dynasty.

When it's hard
Do The Thing.
When you're tired
Do The Thing.
When no one's watching
Do The Thing.
Every single day
Do The Thing.
How We Behave

The Code

These aren't guidelines. They're non-negotiables. The way we carry ourselves inside and outside the building defines Dynasty X KIN.

01
Above the Line — Always
Ownership. Accountability. Responsibility. No blame, no excuses, no denial. Whatever happens, we own it and we fix it. Full stop.
02
Compete Every Day
Champions train when they don't feel like it. We show up. We push. We find one more rep, one more door, one more conversation — every single day.
03
Elevate Everyone Around You
We rise together. Your energy, your attitude, your standard — it's contagious. Make it worth catching. Recruit your replacement. Build people up.
04
Be Obsessed with Growth
Comfortable is the enemy. We study. We train. We fail forward. Stagnation isn't an option when you've committed to becoming your best self.
05
Win the Morning
What you do before 8am determines your day. What you do with your day determines your season. Discipline in the small things creates dominance in the big ones.
"Everything we do makes us
either better or worse."
— The Dynasty Standard
"Be the best inside the job
so you can be the best
outside the job."
— DBD
"We are here to build
the best you."
— Dynasty X KIN
The Daily Standard

Habits That
Build Champions

These aren't suggestions. This is the morning stack that separates people who talk about winning from people who actually do it. Stack these every day and watch your life change.

Cold Water Exposure
2
Gym / Workout

Stack these. Every morning. No excuses.

Mantras
🔥
Discipline Creates Freedom
The most free people are the most disciplined. Build your system and let it carry you.
⚡
Pressure Is a Privilege
It means something is on the line worth competing for. Embrace it.
🏆
Elite Is a Daily Decision
Not a title. Not an achievement. A choice you make before your feet hit the floor.
🎯
Standards Over Feelings
Feelings fade. Standards don't. Hold the line when it's hard — especially then.
🧱
Build the System
You don't rise to the occasion. You fall to the level of your preparation. Prepare obsessively.
🤝
We Rise Together
Recruit your replacement. Elevate your team. A rising tide lifts all ships — be the tide.
💀
Comfortable Is the Enemy
Comfort kills ambition. Lean into the hard thing. That's where you become who you need to be.
👑
Legacy Over Everything
What are you building that outlasts you? Think in decades. Act in days.
